displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #41: The Empire Strikes Back: Imperial Pursuit
synopsis: Luke escapes the downed snowspeeder as an AT-AT approaches, fires a harpoon into its underside, climbs up, cuts open a hatch with his lightsaber, and drops in a thermal detonator to destroy the walker. At Echo Base, Darth Vader personally leads snowtroopers through the Rebel headquarters as Han rushes Leia and C-3PO to the *Millennium Falcon* and takes off. Two Star Destroyers give chase, and Han flies between them so closely that they sideswipe one another; he then leads a squad of TIE bombers into a crowded asteroid field. Meanwhile Luke, rather than joining his squadron at the rendezvous, takes R2-D2 and his X-wing to Dagobah, where he lands in a swampy bog and a strange small creature watches him from afar.
title: Star Wars (1977) #41: The Empire Strikes Back: Imperial Pursuit
